ops.title: capt-hook 8.3.0 API drift: plugin/hooks sed/line-dump handler calls CommandLine.capture, removed in capt-hook 8.x — 4 errors under 'capt-hook --hooks plugin/hooks test'. Read-guard unaffected. Port the handler to the current API.

ops.text: capt-hook --hooks plugin/hooks test reports 0 errors under capt-hook >= 8.3.0
